<!-- Thanks for contributing to Tsumiru! Keep PRs focused on one logical change. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and, more importantly, why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] It builds (`flutter build ...`) and I tested the affected flow.
- [ ] I regenerated code if I touched `@riverpod` annotations or `*.graphql` files (`dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs`).
- [ ] The change is focused and follows the surrounding code style.
